narrative:
Cols 60-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,350 registered voters, with 53.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.7 percentage points.
